description_long: This object is a closed, modern laptop with a sleek, rectangular profile and a matte black finish. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and smooth, with a subtle seam indicating the hinge where the lid meets the base. The edges are straight and slightly beveled, giving it a minimalist and professional appearance. No visible branding, stickers, or ports are apparent on any side, suggesting a clean and unadorned design. The laptop appears to be of average thickness, typical for contemporary models, and is likely constructed from a combination of metal and plastic. The overall look is understated, with no visible buttons, screens, or keyboard elements.
description: A closed, matte black laptop with a minimalist, rectangular design and no visible branding or ports. The surfaces are smooth and unadorned, giving it a modern, professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the seam of the lid and base, with a slight bevel at the edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat, featureless edge and the uniform thickness of the laptop.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the seam visible but no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a flat, smooth edge with no visible ports or details.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is closed and not visible.
